title: GitHub Trigger Node returns 403 error
symptom: When executing the GitHub Trigger Node in test mode, a 'Response Error 403' is encountered. This occurs even when the webhook URL is correctly set.
applies_when: Executing in test mode or production mode
not_this_if: Using a valid personal access token with appropriate permissions
root_cause: The 403 error indicates that the request is forbidden, which can happen if the GitHub webhook is not properly authenticated or if there are too many requests being sent to the ngrok tunnel, leading to rate limiting.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED to false
Check the ngrok account for HTTP request limits
Ensure the GitHub webhook is correctly configured with the right permissions
agent_instruction: Disable diagnostics in n8n to reduce HTTP requests and check your ngrok limits.
